Home / Services / Website Hosting / Enterprise Hosting

👑 Enterprise Hosting

The ultimate hosting solution for businesses that demand the highest levels of performance, security, and support. Enterprise Hosting includes 250GB NVMe storage, fully dedicated server resources, load-balanced architecture for zero-downtime deployments, multi-region redundancy, PCI-DSS compliant infrastructure (essential for e-commerce), advanced DDoS mitigation, custom firewall rules, hourly backups with 90-day retention, and a dedicated account manager available 24/7. We proactively monitor, optimise, and scale your infrastructure as your business grows. Custom configurations available on request. This is hosting that never lets you down.

Service Details

Category: Website Hosting

Credits Price: 120 credits (approx. £150)

Turnaround: Monthly subscription

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within Monthly subscription
Book Enterprise Hosting Now

Related Website Hosting Services

  • Starter Hosting — Reliable shared hosting for small websites, blogs, and portfolios with 10GB SSD storage. (8 credits)
  • Business Hosting — Enhanced hosting for growing businesses with 50GB SSD, staging environment, and priority support. (24 credits)
  • Professional Hosting — High-performance dedicated resources with 100GB NVMe, auto-scaling, and white-glove support. (48 credits)

Why Choose Creative Kaygency for Enterprise Hosting?

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: Monthly subscription
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
